nodes.label: Gravity Search — Logical Consistency Verifier Fills the gap left by numeric_ver
Checks extracted financial facts for logical consistency.      Uses determinis
Run all logic checks against answer text and extracted facts.          Args:
Rule: If gross_margin expanded, then EITHER revenue grew faster than COGS,
Rule: If EPS changed direction opposite to Net Income, it must be         expla
Rule: FCF = Operating Cash Flow - CapEx.         If all three are stated, verif
Rule: If revenue is growing but gross profit is falling, gross margin is contrac
Rule: Detect when positive narrative language contradicts negative numbers.
Rule: Interest Coverage = EBIT / Interest Expense.         If coverage < 1.5x,
Rule: If revenue is declining but inventory is rising, demand destruction signal
Build nested dict: entity → period → {metric: value}
Get a fact value, trying multiple key aliases.
Look up the prior period value for a metric.
Extract arithmetic calculation steps from LLM answer text and verify         th
Convenience function: run all logic verification including step arithmetic.
